pollInterval.title: Poll Interval (seconds)
pollInterval.description: How often to check device state. Drops to 10s automatically during door transitions.

name.title: Device Name
name.description: Must match the name in the Omlet app exactly (check Homebridge log for discovered names)

hideLight.title: Hide Light
hideLight.description: Hide the coop light accessory for this door

layout.description: How often to check door state (seconds). Drops to 10s automatically during transitions.

layout.title: Device Settings
layout.description: Optional per-device overrides. Device names are logged at startup — check the Homebridge log.
